patches.description: Auto-claim rewarded ad rewards without watching ads. Supports MAX Unity, native MAX. Enabling No Ads will prevent rewards from being claimed.
patches.name: Ads Free Rewards

patches.description: Blocks all non-rewarded ads: interstitial, banner, app open, MREC. Supports MAX Unity and native MAX. Enabling alongside Ads Free Rewards will prevent rewards from being claimed.
patches.name: No Ads

patches.description: Makes the app think it was installed from Google Play Store. Prevents Pairip license check from failing. Recommended if the app is installed from Play Store.
patches.name: Spoof Play Store Install Source
